scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run --cwd apps/site build && bun run --cwd apps/cloudflare typecheck && tsc -p examples/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:packages: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/local build && bun run --cwd packages/ai build && bun run --cwd packages/vercel build && bun run --cwd packages/e2b build && bun run --cwd packages/daytona build && bun run --cwd packages/cloudflare build
scripts.pack:packages: for p in packages/core packages/local packages/ai packages/vercel packages/e2b packages/daytona packages/cloudflare; do (cd $p && bun pm pack --dry-run); done
scripts.test: bun run build:packages && bun test packages test
scripts.test:live: bun run build:packages && bun test packages/cloudflare/test/live.test.ts packages/daytona/test/live.test.ts packages/e2b/test/live.test.ts packages/vercel/test/live.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: bun run build:packages && bun run --cwd apps/site typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/cloudflare typecheck && tsc -p examples/tsconfig.json
